data.title: Society Pass Faces Nasdaq Delinquency Notice on Late 10-K
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Society Pass ( (SOPA) ) is now available.

On April 16, 2026, Society Pass Incorporated received a Nasdaq delinquency notification after failing to file its Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025, as required under Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). The notice does not immediately affect the listing of SOPA shares, but continued non-compliance could ultimately lead to the company’s securities being delisted from the exchange.

Nasdaq has given Society Pass 60 days, until June 15, 2026, to submit a compliance plan, with a potential extension of up to 180 days from the original filing due date, or until October 12, 2026. The company says it is working to complete and file the overdue annual report within the 60-day window, a step that would remove the need for a formal remediation plan and help preserve its Nasdaq listing status.

The most recent analyst rating on (SOPA) stock is a Buy with a $25.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Society Pass stock, see the SOPA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SOPA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SOPA is a Neutral.

Society Pass faces significant financial challenges, with consistent losses and negative equity. While there are some improvements in cash flow, the overall financial stability is weak. Technical analysis indicates bearish momentum, and the valuation is unattractive due to a negative P/E ratio. These factors contribute to a low overall stock score.

To see Spark’s full report on SOPA stock, click here.

More about Society Pass

Society Pass Incorporated is a Nasdaq-listed holding company operating across digital media, travel and lifestyle in Southeast Asia’s fast-growing markets, including Vietnam, Indonesia, the Philippines, Singapore and Thailand. Founded in 2018, it runs an e-commerce ecosystem that leverages technology to personalize customer purchase journeys and modernize the regional retail value chain.

The company maintains offices in Bangkok, Ho Chi Minh City, Jakarta, Manila and Singapore to support its regional operations. Society Pass completed its initial public offering in November 2021 and trades on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SOPA, targeting consumers and merchants across key Southeast Asian economies.

Average Trading Volume: 2,045,170

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.9M

Learn more about SOPA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: CVB Financial Completes Heritage Commerce All-Stock Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cvb Financial ( (CVBF) ) has shared an update.

On April 17, 2026, CVB Financial Corp. completed its all-stock acquisition of Heritage Commerce Corp., merging Heritage into CVBF and combining Heritage Bank of Commerce with Citizens Business Bank, which now exceeds $20 billion in assets, about $12 billion in loans and roughly $17 billion in deposits and customer repurchase agreements. The transaction expands Citizens’ footprint with 16 Bay Area branches, adds roughly 41 million new CVBF shares, and is accompanied by leadership and governance changes, including the appointment of former Heritage CEO Clay Jones as president of CVBF and Citizens, his and former Heritage chair Julianne Biagini-Komas’s addition to both boards, and revised severance protections for Jones and other named executive officers, underscoring the strategic scale-up and integration of the combined California business banking franchise.

The most recent analyst rating on (CVBF) stock is a Buy with a $26.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cvb Financial stock, see the CVBF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CVBF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CVBF is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong underlying profitability and balance sheet improvement, supported by an attractive dividend yield and moderate P/E. These positives are tempered by weakening recent cash flow trends, cautious macro/CRE commentary from management, and neutral-to-mixed technical momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on CVBF stock, click here.

More about Cvb Financial

CVB Financial Corp. is the holding company for Citizens Business Bank, one of the ten largest bank holding companies headquartered in California, with more than $20 billion in total assets following its mergers with Heritage Commerce Corp and Heritage Bank of Commerce. Citizens Business Bank offers a broad range of banking, lending and investing services through more than 75 banking centers and three trust offices, with a franchise focused on relationship-based business banking across California’s major metropolitan markets.

data.title: Waton Financial Boosts AI Trading Stake and Engages Finder for SPAC Deal Hunt
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Waton Financial Limited ( (WTF) ) has provided an announcement.

Waton Financial Limited disclosed that on November 19, 2025 its wholly owned subsidiary Waton AI Genius Holding Limited agreed to purchase a US$2.82 million convertible promissory note from Cayman-based PandaAI Quantum Holdings, a joint-venture vehicle for AI-powered quantitative trading. After closing and satisfaction of conversion conditions, Waton AI converted the note into 7.5 million founding partner preferred shares at a price of US$0.376350156 per share on April 16, 2026, formalizing its equity stake in the AI trading venture.

The company also reported that on April 19, 2026 it signed a finder’s services agreement with OCASIA Group Holdings to help its wholly owned SPAC, Love & Health Limited, source potential acquisition targets. Under the agreement, Waton will pay an upfront US$1.2 million fee, creditable against a success fee tied to the pre-money valuation of any introduced target, aligning incentives as the SPAC seeks a sizable business combination in the coming months.

Spark’s Take on WTF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WTF is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down mainly by the sharp reversal to a large 2025 net loss and volatile cash flows, despite a relatively low-leverage balance sheet. Technicals also remain weak with the stock trading below key moving averages and a negative MACD. Valuation is pressured by losses and the absence of a dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on WTF stock, click here.

More about Waton Financial Limited

Waton Financial Limited, based in Hong Kong, operates in the financial services and fintech sector and uses subsidiaries to pursue opportunities in AI-driven trading and capital markets. Through its Waton AI Genius Holding Limited unit and its Love & Health Limited SPAC, the company is expanding into AI-powered quantitative trading and acquisition-driven growth, targeting technologically advanced operating businesses.

data.title: Quetta Acquisition Faces Nasdaq Delisting Over Compliance Issues
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Quetta Acquisition Corp. ( (QETA) ) has shared an announcement.

Quetta Acquisition Corporation, a special purpose acquisition company listed on Nasdaq, is facing multiple compliance deficiencies that threaten its continued listing status. The company primarily exists to complete a business combination, but its ability to access public capital markets now depends on satisfying Nasdaq’s market value, shareholder count and reporting requirements.

On April 6, 2026, Nasdaq staff determined the company should be delisted for failing to regain compliance with the minimum market value of listed securities and the requirement to maintain at least 400 total holders. Nasdaq issued an additional notice on April 20, 2026, citing the company’s failure to file its 2025 annual report on time as a further delisting basis, prompting Quetta to seek a May 14, 2026 hearing where it plans to address these issues, although the outcome and potential stay of trading suspension remain uncertain.

More about Quetta Acquisition Corp.

Quetta Acquisition Corporation is a special purpose acquisition company formed to pursue mergers, share exchanges, asset acquisitions or similar business combinations, typically targeting private businesses seeking access to U.S. public markets. The company’s securities are listed on Nasdaq, subject to meeting ongoing quantitative and shareholder-based listing standards.

Average Trading Volume: 2,847

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $43.21M

Learn more about QETA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Pyrophyte Acquisition ( (PHYTF) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, Pyrophyte Acquisition’s sponsor deposited $227,093.10, plus $3,782.71 in interest, into the company’s trust account, funding the tenth, eleventh and twelfth monthly payments tied to a previously approved extension of its business combination deadline from April 29, 2025 to April 29, 2026. The company has also filed and mailed a definitive proxy statement dated April 8, 2026 for shareholders to vote on a further extension of the time allowed to complete its initial business combination, underscoring ongoing efforts to preserve its deal-making window and maintain investor capital in trust while it continues its search for a transaction.

Pyrophyte Acquisition Corp. is a special purpose acquisition company formed to complete an initial business combination within a specified timeframe. Like other blank-check companies, it raises capital in a trust account and seeks shareholder approval for deadline extensions as it evaluates potential merger targets in the market.

data.title: NeoVolta Expands Global Reach With Potisedge Equity Agreement
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

NeoVolta ( (NEOV) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 15, 2026, NeoVolta Power, NeoVolta and Can Current Corporation amended and restated the operating agreement for NeoVolta Power, removing NPJV MANAGER LLC as a member, increasing NeoVolta’s Class A equity stake, reducing and reallocating Class B units solely to CCC, and consolidating board control under NeoVolta while granting CCC non‑voting observer rights tied to technical services. That same day they also amended the contribution agreement to remove NMC, and NeoVolta Power agreed to buy $9 million of CCC’s battery storage manufacturing equipment under a milestone‑based asset purchase, strengthening the Georgia facility’s build‑out and NeoVolta’s operational control of the venture.

On April 20, 2026, NeoVolta entered a management services agreement with Singapore‑based Potisedge Technology to provide sales and marketing coordination for its commercial and industrial battery storage business in exchange for up to 1.2 million NeoVolta common shares vesting over 24 months. The equity‑based compensation, structured with forfeiture and accelerated vesting provisions upon certain terminations, is intended to align Potisedge’s incentives with NeoVolta’s growth objectives and deepen its international commercial capabilities.

The most recent analyst rating on (NEOV) stock is a Buy with a $7.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NeoVolta stock, see the NEOV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NEOV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NEOV is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance—large losses and significant cash burn despite manageable leverage. Technicals add pressure with the stock trading below key moving averages and a negative MACD. Valuation is hard to justify with negative earnings and no dividend, while corporate events are mixed due to dilution from the equity raise and leadership turnover.

To see Spark’s full report on NEOV stock, click here.

More about NeoVolta

NeoVolta Inc. is a Nevada-based company focused on commercial and industrial battery energy storage, with operations tied to a domestic manufacturing facility in Georgia through its NeoVolta Power, LLC joint venture. The company’s strategy centers on owning and operating battery energy storage manufacturing capacity in the U.S. while leveraging technical and marketing partnerships to expand its market presence.

data.title: FiscalNote Gains Temporary Debt Relief After NYSE Delisting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

FiscalNote Holdings ( (NOTE) ) has issued an update.

FiscalNote Holdings, Inc. saw its Class A common stock and warrants delisted from the New York Stock Exchange after the NYSE filed a Form 25 with the SEC on April 3, 2026, with the delisting becoming effective on April 13, 2026. The securities now trade on the OTCID Basic Market under the symbols NOTE and NOTEW, and the company has indicated it plans to seek listing on alternative tiers or exchanges to improve investor access and liquidity as it advances its strategic plans.

Following the delisting, FiscalNote entered into forbearance agreements on April 21, 2026, with subordinated creditors GPO FN Noteholder, LLC and YA II PN, Ltd, who agreed to waive defaults under subordinated convertible debt triggered by the delisting and to refrain from exercising related rights until May 21, 2026. The agreements provide temporary relief on debt covenant breaches, aiming to stabilize the company’s capital structure and preserve operational flexibility while it navigates the transition to OTC trading and explores new listing options.

The most recent analyst rating on (NOTE) stock is a Buy with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on FiscalNote Holdings stock, see the NOTE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NOTE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NOTE is a Underperform.

The score is pressured primarily by weak financial performance (persistent negative operating/free cash flow and a sharp profitability deterioration in 2025) and a deeply bearish technical setup (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation provides limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend, and corporate events add downside risk from delisting/OTC transition despite some constructive strategy announcements.

To see Spark’s full report on NOTE stock, click here.

More about FiscalNote Holdings

FiscalNote Holdings, Inc. operates in the information and data services industry, providing technology-driven policy and regulatory intelligence. Its primary products include data platforms and analytical tools that help businesses and institutions track, interpret, and respond to legislative and regulatory developments, with a market focus on clients requiring real-time policy insights.

data.title: Heritage Distilling Announces 1-for-20 Reverse Stock Split
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Heritage Distilling Holding Company ( (IPST) ) has provided an update.

On April 21, 2026, IP Strategy Holdings, Inc. announced that it had filed a certificate of amendment in Delaware to implement a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its common stock, with the split becoming effective at 12:01 a.m. Eastern Time on April 23, 2026 and trading on a split-adjusted basis on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the existing IPST ticker from the market open that day. Every 20 shares of issued and outstanding common stock will be consolidated into one share, with no change to the number of authorized common or preferred shares, while fractional positions will be settled in cash based on the April 22, 2026 closing price.

The company’s April 10, 2026 special meeting of stockholders authorized a reverse split ratio between 1-for-3 and 1-for-20, and the board set the final 1-for-20 ratio on April 17, 2026, leaving each investor’s percentage ownership and voting power largely intact aside from minor rounding effects. As a result, outstanding common shares will shrink from about 10.6 million to roughly 530,000, and all stock options, warrants and preferred stock conversion terms will be proportionately adjusted, a move aimed at managing dilution and supporting compliance with Nasdaq’s minimum bid price requirements while increasing the pool of unissued but authorized shares available for future corporate purposes.

The most recent analyst rating on (IPST) stock is a Buy with a $8.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Heritage Distilling Holding Company stock, see the IPST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IPST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IPST is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak profitability and ongoing cash burn, with added risk from balance-sheet volatility. Technically, the stock remains in a weak longer-term trend, and valuation signals are poor due to negative earnings and no dividend support. Corporate events are mixed, but delisting/reverse-split risk is a notable overhang.

To see Spark’s full report on IPST stock, click here.

More about Heritage Distilling Holding Company

IP Strategy Holdings, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as IPST, is the first Nasdaq-traded company to use the $IP token as a primary treasury reserve asset while operating a validator for the Story Protocol, giving public equity investors regulated exposure to the emerging programmable intellectual property economy.

Through its $IP token holdings, the company participates directly in Story’s on-chain ecosystem, which supports registration, licensing and monetization of intellectual property, targeting new markets across AI, media and entertainment for tokenized, legally enforceable digital IP assets.

Average Trading Volume: 3,417,474

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

See more insights into IPST stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: PPG Shareholders Endorse Governance, Approve New Incentive Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

PPG Industries ( (PPG) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 15, 2026, PPG’s board compensation committee approved new performance-based Market Stock Unit awards for certain executive officers, notably granting $1.5 million target MSU awards to K. Henrik Bergstrom and Kevin Braun while excluding CEO Timothy Knavish and retiring CFO Vincent Morales. The MSUs, which vest on May 8, 2029, tie payouts directly to three-year absolute stock price performance and an earnings-per-share threshold, reinforcing pay-for-performance discipline and executive retention while linking leadership rewards to shareholder returns.

At the April 16, 2026 annual meeting, shareholders re-elected 12 directors, approved advisory executive compensation, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers as the 2026 auditor, and backed a new omnibus incentive plan, signaling broad support for PPG’s governance and pay structures. A shareholder proposal to require an independent board chair failed, preserving the current leadership framework and indicating investor acceptance of the combined chair and CEO role.

The most recent analyst rating on (PPG) stock is a Hold with a $127.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PPG Industries stock, see the PPG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PPG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PPG is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weaker financial resilience signals in the latest statements (negative equity and negative free cash flow), despite solid reported profitability. Technicals are supportive with a strong uptrend, and valuation appears reasonable with a mid-teens P/E and a ~2.4% dividend. The latest earnings call adds a moderately positive tilt via steady 2026 guidance and aerospace-driven momentum, tempered by near-term cost and demand headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on PPG stock, click here.

More about PPG Industries

PPG Industries, Inc. is a global manufacturer in the paints, coatings and specialty materials industry, supplying products for industrial, automotive, aerospace and construction markets. The company focuses on enterprise growth strategies that emphasize long-term stock performance and aligning executive incentives with shareholder value in highly competitive coatings and materials segments.

Average Trading Volume: 2,249,429

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $24.11B
